name: s2-docs
description: Plugin for creating professional documents with S2GRUPO branding: PPTX presentations, spreadsheets, and more. Includes animated terminals, code blocks, cards, tables, and the complete corporate identity.

s2-create-pptx.description: Creates a professional PPTX presentation with S2GRUPO branding, animated terminals, and corporate visual components

s2-create-training.description: Generates a complete training package (guide + PPTX) with S2GRUPO branding
